title: thelypteris heteroclita
intro: Thelypteris heteroclita, also known as the fern-leaved lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris heteroclita include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
